name: Memory Vector
description: Semantic memory search over a local LanceDB vector index. Wraps the Python indexing pipeline into discoverable OpenClaw tools.

workspaceRoot.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw workspace root. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace.

memoryRoot.description: Path to a broad memory root, relative to workspaceRoot or absolute. Defaults to the workspace root. Prefer memoryPaths for exact folders/files.

memoryPaths.description: Exact memory files or folders to ingest. Relative paths resolve under workspaceRoot. When set, these paths take precedence over memoryRoot scanning.

indexPath.description: Path to LanceDB index relative to workspaceRoot. Defaults to plugins/memory-vector/vector.

embeddingModel.description: Sentence-transformers model name. Defaults to all-MiniLM-L6-v2.

maxSearchResults.description: Default maximum results per search. Defaults to 20.

pythonPath.description: Python binary to use for subprocess calls. Defaults to python3.

venvPath.description: Path to Python virtualenv. Defaults to scripts/.venv relative to plugin directory.

watchEnabled.description: Start file watcher on plugin activation. Defaults to false.

watchDebounceSeconds.description: Debounce window in seconds before ingest runs after file change. Defaults to 2.
